subject: [PATCH v5 11/18] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch extends three mm paths to treat VM_UFFD_RWP the same as VM_UFFD_WP, ensuring that per-PTE RWP state is not silently destroyed or bypassed. The changes affect khugepaged, rmap, and GUP, which are modified to handle VM_UFFD_RWP ranges with the same protection as VM_UFFD_WP. This patch addresses a problem where userfaultfd RWP markers were being ignored in certain scenarios, leading to potential data corruption or security issues.
